ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sales record */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year for reporting */,
  "chain" TEXT /* Name of the retail chain */,
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the suburb */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the suburb */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the sale location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager responsible for the sales */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the buyer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "sale_type" TEXT /* Type of sale (e.g., in-store, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_buyer_id FOREIGN KEY ("buyer_id") REFERENCES buyers ("buyer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_suburb_id FOREIGN KEY ("suburb_id") REFERENCES suburbs ("suburb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the manager's tenure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the manager's tenure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "buyers" (
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each buyer */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the buyer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the buyer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "loyalty_program" INTEGER /* Indicates if the buyer is part of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("buyer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suburbs" (
  "suburb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suburb */,
  "suburb_name" TEXT /* Name of the suburb */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the suburb is located */,
  "postcode" INTEGER /* Postal code of the suburb */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suburb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_suburbs_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "state" TEXT /* State included in the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_summary" (
  "summary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each summary record */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date for which the summary is calculated */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the date and category */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of products sold for the date and category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("summary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_summary_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trend record */,
  "financial_year" TEXT /* Financial year for the trend analysis */,
  "total_sales" REAL /* Total sales amount for the financial year */,
  "growth_rate" REAL /* Growth rate of sales compared to the previous year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "promo_sales" (
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each promotional event */,
  "promo_name" TEXT /* Name of the promotion */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate of the promotion */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the promotion */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the promotion */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("promo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_promo_sales_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_promotions" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales record */,
  "promo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the promotional event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id", "promo_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each sales record
Reference to the manager responsible for the sales
Start date of the manager's tenure
End date of the manager's tenure
Unique identifier for each product category
Reference to the parent category (if applicable)
Indicates if the buyer is part of the loyalty program
State where the suburb is located
Unique identifier for each summary record
Date for which the summary is calculated
Total sales amount for the date and category
Average price of products sold for the date and category
Unique identifier for each trend record
Financial year for the trend analysis
Total sales amount for the financial year
Growth rate of sales compared to the previous year
Unique identifier for each promotional event
